pages.text:
**NOTARIAL DEED OF PURCHASE**

**Document ID: purchase_003**
**Date of Deed: 7 May 2015**
**Place of Execution: Ghent, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, Ghent**

---

**APPEARANCE**

On this day, the seventh of May, in the year two thousand and fifteen, before me, Meester Pieter Van
Renterghem, Notary in Ghent, Belgium, appeared:

1. **Thomas Janssen**, born on 9 November 1972, residing at [insert address], Ghent, Belgium;
2. **Sarah Janssen-Peeters**, born on 4 February 1975, residing at [insert address], Ghent, Belgium;

Both parties hereinafter referred to as the "Buyers" and collectively as the "Parties".

And:

3. **Urban Living Projects NV**, a company incorporated under Belgian law, having its registered office at
[insert registered office address], represented by [insert representative’s name and function], hereinafter
referred to as the "Seller".

**BACKGROUND**

The Buyers declare that this transaction concerns their first jointly owned residential apartment. The
object of this deed is the purchase of an apartment located at Stationsstraat 8, 9000 Ghent, Belgium, and
is identified in the Belgian Cadastre under the reference Ghent, 3rd division, section F, number 904/M
(hereinafter referred to as the "Property").

**STATEMENTS**

The Seller declares that they are the sole and rightful owner of the Property and that the Property is free
from all encumbrances, pledges, and any third-party rights, except as may be specified herein. The
Buyers have inspected the Property and are satisfied with its condition.

**ARTICLES**

**Article 1: Object of the Purchase**
The Seller sells, and the Buyers purchase the Property, as described above.

**Article 2: Title**
The transfer of ownership of the Property shall take effect upon the registration of this deed with the

relevant tax authorities.

**Article 3: Purchase Price**
The total purchase price for the Property is set at Two Hundred Ten Thousand Euros (EUR 210,000).

**Article 4: Payment**
The Buyers will fund the purchase through a combination of their own funds and bank financing. The
balance of the purchase price after financing shall be paid to the Seller at the time of signature of this
deed.

**Article 5: Common Parts**
The Buyers acknowledge that the Property includes the right to enjoy the common parts of the building in
accordance with the syndic regulations. They undertake to comply with all rules and regulations
established by the syndic.

**Article 6: Transfer of Keys and Occupation**
The Seller shall deliver the keys and grant possession of the Property to the Buyers on the date of
signature of this deed. The Buyers shall assume all risks and benefits associated with the Property from
that moment.

**Article 7: Co-Ownership Rules**
The Buyers acknowledge that they will co-own the Property as joint owners. Their respective shares will
be equal. They agree to abide by all laws and regulations governing co-ownership as established under
the Belgian Civil Code.

**Article 8: Charges and Taxes**
The Buyers acknowledge that they are responsible for all property taxes, registration fees, and any other
charges related to the ownership of the Property from the date of transfer.

**Article 9: Notarial Costs**
The Parties agree that the costs of this deed, including notarial fees and registration costs, shall be borne
by the Buyers in accordance with standard practice.

**SIGNATURE AND CERTIFICATION**

Thus, having read this deed in full to the Parties, and the Parties having confirmed their understanding
and agreement hereof, I, Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, Notary, have executed this deed in Ghent,
Belgium, on the date first written above.

The Parties hereby declare that they have signed this deed in the presence of me, the Notary, who
certifies the authenticity of their signatures.

**[Signature of Thomas Janssen]**
**[Signature of Sarah Janssen-Peeters]**
**[Signature of Urban Living Projects NV, representative]**

**[Signature of Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, Notary]**

---

**This document has been executed in four (4) original copies, one for each Party and one for the
Notary’s records.**

**Date of Deed: 7 May 2015**
**Place of Execution: Ghent, Belgium**

**[Signature of Thomas Janssen]**
**[Signature of Sarah Janssen-Peeters]**
**[Signature of Urban Living Projects NV, representative]**

**[Signature of Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, Notary]**

---

**This document has been executed in four (4) original copies, one for each Party and one for the
Notary’s records.**
